rules.intent: Preserve the approved gradient callout CTA composition and fallback behavior across email clients.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section is a full-width (600px) banner with a headline and a single button overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image (Gradient_callout.png), both horizontally centered and stacked. The gradient PNG is applied as the section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, with section padding 48px 25px 56px 25px. A solid background-color of Sunshine (#faa31b) must always be set as fallback since clients like Outlook drop background images. The headline sits in the top third: Brand Blue (#00529b), centered, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, line-height 34px, one line, padding 0 0 32px 0.

    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"

rules.intent: Lock the approved gradient callout button appearance.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout button is centered in the lower-middle below the headline. Fill Deep Blue (#003D74), white label (Nunito Sans weight 800, 18px), line-height 64px, with a Gold (#FFC20E) arrow '›' (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

`border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Protect the signature asymmetric button shape from being altered.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout button border-radius is mandatory and must never change: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px. This four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is always required on every instance, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

quotes: border-radius:49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;

rules.intent: Ensure the approved gradient asset is used unmodified and skip behavior preserves all other specs.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout background asset (Gradient_callout.png) must not be re-hosted or recolored. The background may be skipped only in very, very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position — keep background-color="#faa31b" (Sunshine) and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above; every other rule stays identical.
rules.snippets: If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

quotes: If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.
